requirement_topic.en: Low-Voltage Electrical Installation Safety — ABNT NBR 5410 and NBR 16612
requirement_topic.zh: 低压电气安装安全——ABNT NBR 5410和NBR 16612
requirement_topic.zht: 低壓電氣安裝安全——ABNT NBR 5410和NBR 16612

summary.en: ABNT NBR 5410:2004 (Low-voltage electrical installations) is Brazil's foundational standard for all low-voltage electrical installation work, equivalent in scope to IEC 60364 series. It governs wiring, protective devices, earthing systems, and overcurrent protection. For EV charging infrastructure specifically, ABNT NBR 16612:2020 (Electric vehicle supply equipment — Requirements for conductive charging systems and infrastructure — Safety) provides the dedicated Brazilian installation and safety standard for EV charging stations. Together these define earthing system requirements (TN, TT, IT systems), RCD (DR — dispositivo de corrente residual) requirements, wiring sizing, and installation practices for the building-side infrastructure supporting EV chargers. Compliance with NBR 16612 is referenced in INMETRO's EV charging certification requirements.
summary.zh: ABNT NBR 5410:2004（低压电气安装）是巴西所有低压电气安装工程的基础标准，范围相当于IEC 60364系列。该标准规定了布线、保护装置、接地系统和过流保护要求。针对充电基础设施，ABNT NBR 16612:2020（电动汽车供电设备——传导充电系统及基础设施要求——安全）提供了专用的巴西充电站安装和安全标准。两者共同规定了支持充电设备的建筑侧基础设施的接地系统要求（TN、TT、IT系统）、漏电保护装置（DR）要求、导线截面计算及安装规程。INMETRO的充电设备认证要求中引用了NBR 16612合规性。
summary.zht: ABNT NBR 5410:2004（低壓電氣安裝）是巴西所有低壓電氣安裝工程的基礎標準，範圍相當於IEC 60364系列。該標準規定了布線、保護裝置、接地系統和過流保護要求。針對充電基礎設施，ABNT NBR 16612:2020（電動汽車供電設備——傳導充電系統及基礎設施要求——安全）提供了專用的巴西充電站安裝和安全標準。兩者共同規定了支持充電設備的建築側基礎設施的接地系統要求（TN、TT、IT系統）、漏電保護裝置（DR）要求、導線截面計算及安裝規程。INMETRO的充電設備認證要求中引用了NBR 16612合規性。

standards_or_laws: ABNT NBR 5410:2004 — Low-voltage electrical installations (Brazilian standard; check ABNT catalogue for any revisions post-2004)
ABNT NBR 16612:2020 — Electric vehicle supply equipment — Requirements for conductive charging systems and infrastructure — Safety (dedicated EV charging installation standard)

summary.en: China's equivalent installation standards are GB 50966-2014 (Code for design of electric vehicle charging station) and GB/T 51313-2018 (Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure), both administered by the Ministry of Housing and Urban-Rural Development (MOHURD). Key differences from Brazilian requirements: (1) China uses a 50 Hz grid; Brazil uses 60 Hz — this affects protective device timing and charger electronics; (2) Earthing system assumptions differ; (3) RCD type requirements differ — Brazilian NBR 16612 requires DC fault detection (similar to IEC 60364-7-722 Type B/A+DC approach), while Chinese standards have different earthing fault protection assumptions; (4) Brazilian installations operate at 127 V / 220 V (single-phase), 220 V / 380 V (three-phase), which differs from China's 220 V / 380 V 50 Hz systems.
summary.zh: 中国对应安装标准为GB 50966-2014（电动汽车充电站设计规范）及GB/T 51313-2018（电动汽车充电基础设施技术标准），均由住房和城乡建设部负责管理。与巴西要求的主要差异：（1）中国使用50Hz电网，巴西使用60Hz——影响保护装置时序和充电设备电子器件；（2）接地系统假设不同；（3）漏电保护要求不同——巴西NBR 16612要求直流故障检测（类似IEC 60364-7-722的B型/A型+直流检测方式），而中国标准对接地故障保护有不同假设；（4）巴西安装系统为127V/220V（单相）、220V/380V（三相），与中国220V/380V 50Hz系统不同。
summary.zht: 中國對應安裝標準為GB 50966-2014（電動汽車充電站設計規範）及GB/T 51313-2018（電動汽車充電基礎設施技術標準），均由住房和城鄉建設部負責管理。與巴西要求的主要差異：（1）中國使用50Hz電網，巴西使用60Hz——影響保護裝置時序和充電設備電子器件；（2）接地系統假設不同；（3）漏電保護要求不同——巴西NBR 16612要求直流故障檢測（類似IEC 60364-7-722的B型/A型+直流檢測方式），而中國標準對接地故障保護有不同假設；（4）巴西安裝系統為127V/220V（單相）、220V/380V（三相），與中國220V/380V 50Hz系統不同。

standards_or_laws: GB 50966-2014 — Code for design of electric vehicle charging station (MOHURD; 50 Hz basis)
GB/T 51313-2018 — Technical standard for electric vehicle charging infrastructure (MOHURD/MIIT)

gap.en: The grid frequency difference (50 Hz China vs. 60 Hz Brazil) is a fundamental hardware and certification gap. EV charger power electronics, filter components, and protection device timings designed for 50 Hz must be re-validated and re-tested for 60 Hz operation. Additionally: (1) EV chargers must be compatible with Brazilian RCD (DR) requirements under NBR 16612, including DC fault detection capability; (2) Product documentation must include Portuguese-language installation manuals referencing NBR 5410 / NBR 16612 installation practices; (3) The INMETRO-certified product configuration must match the installation configuration (voltage range, earthing system, current ratings). Brazilian installation standards are enforcement obligations — incorrect field installation can void insurance, cause regulatory penalties, and block grid connection.
gap.zh: 电网频率差异（中国50Hz对比巴西60Hz）是根本性的硬件和认证差距。针对50Hz设计的充电设备电力电子器件、滤波元件及保护装置时序须重新验证和测试以适应60Hz运行。此外：（1）充电设备须与NBR 16612项下的巴西DR（漏电保护）要求兼容，包括直流故障检测能力；（2）产品文件须包含葡萄牙语安装说明书，并引用NBR 5410/NBR 16612安装规程；（3）INMETRO认证产品配置须与安装配置一致（电压范围、接地系统、电流额定值）。巴西安装标准是强制性规定——现场安装不当可能导致保险失效、监管处罚及电网接入被拒。
gap.zht: 電網頻率差異（中國50Hz對比巴西60Hz）是根本性的硬體和認證差距。針對50Hz設計的充電設備電力電子器件、濾波元件及保護裝置時序須重新驗證和測試以適應60Hz運行。此外：（1）充電設備須與NBR 16612項下的巴西DR（漏電保護）要求相容，包括直流故障檢測能力；（2）產品文件須包含葡萄牙語安裝說明書，並引用NBR 5410/NBR 16612安裝規程；（3）INMETRO認證產品配置須與安裝配置一致（電壓範圍、接地系統、電流額定值）。巴西安裝標準是強制性規定——現場安裝不當可能導致保險失效、監管處罰及電網接入被拒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — NBR 5410 and NBR 16612 are mandatory installation requirements enforced through INMETRO certification scope and local electrical installation inspections; ANEEL distribution concessionaires require compliance for grid connection approval
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for domestic installation — GB 50966-2014 / GB/T 51313-2018 under MOHURD (50 Hz basis; not applicable in Brazil)

source.publisher: ABNT — Associação Brasileira de Normas Técnicas

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Brazilian EV charging infrastructure requires compliance with ABNT NBR 5410 (general low-voltage installation) and ABNT NBR 16612 (dedicated EV charging installation safety). The 60 Hz grid frequency is a critical hardware difference from China's 50 Hz that requires product re-validation. Chinese installation documentation under GB 50966/GB/T 51313 does not satisfy Brazilian requirements. INMETRO-certified products must match declared installation parameters, and field installation must comply with NBR 5410/NBR 16612.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】巴西充电基础设施须符合ABNT NBR 5410（低压安装通用规定）和ABNT NBR 16612（充电安装安全专用标准）。60Hz电网频率与中国50Hz存在关键性硬件差异，需对产品进行重新验证。中国依据GB 50966/GB/T 51313出具的安装文件不满足巴西要求。INMETRO认证产品须与声明的安装参数一致，现场安装须符合NBR 5410/NBR 16612。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】巴西充電基礎設施須符合ABNT NBR 5410（低壓安裝通用規定）和ABNT NBR 16612（充電安裝安全專用標準）。60Hz電網頻率與中國50Hz存在關鍵性硬體差異，需對產品進行重新驗證。中國依據GB 50966/GB/T 51313出具的安裝文件不滿足巴西要求。INMETRO認證產品須與聲明的安裝參數一致，現場安裝須符合NBR 5410/NBR 16612。

requirement_topic.en: Grid Connection and EV Charging — ANEEL Regulations
requirement_topic.zh: 电网接入与电动汽车充电——ANEEL监管规定
requirement_topic.zht: 電網接入與電動汽車充電——ANEEL監管規定

summary.en: ANEEL (Agência Nacional de Energia Elétrica — Brazil's National Electrical Energy Agency) regulates the connection of EV charging stations to the distribution grid. ANEEL Resolução Normativa No. 1000/2021 (the updated distribution system access and connection rules, consolidating and replacing earlier resolutions) governs the access conditions and power quality requirements for new loads including EV charging stations. Operators of public charging stations must comply with ANEEL's grid quality standards and concession holder requirements. For larger charging stations, a formal connection study (estudo de conexão) may be required with the local distribution concessionaire (e.g., Enel, CPFL, Cemig). ANEEL's regulatory framework for EV charging is actively being updated to accommodate the rapid growth of the EV market.
summary.zh: ANEEL（巴西国家电力能源署）负责监管充电站接入配电网。ANEEL规范性决议第1000/2021号（更新版配电系统接入和连接规则，整合并取代早期决议）规范包括充电站在内的新负荷的接入条件和电能质量要求。公共充电站运营商须遵守ANEEL的电网质量标准及特许权持有人要求。对于较大型充电站，可能须与当地配电特许权持有人（如Enel、CPFL、Cemig）进行正式的连接研究（接入研究）。ANEEL为充电设备制定的监管框架仍在积极更新，以适应快速增长的电动汽车市场。
summary.zht: ANEEL（巴西國家電力能源署）負責監管充電站接入配電網。ANEEL規範性決議第1000/2021號（更新版配電系統接入和連接規則，整合並取代早期決議）規範包括充電站在內的新負荷的接入條件和電能質量要求。公共充電站運營商須遵守ANEEL的電網質量標準及特許權持有人要求。對於較大型充電站，可能須與當地配電特許權持有人（如Enel、CPFL、Cemig）進行正式的連接研究（接入研究）。ANEEL為充電設備制定的監管框架仍在積極更新，以適應快速增長的電動汽車市場。

standards_or_laws: ANEEL Resolução Normativa No. 1000/2021 — Distribution System (PRODIST) — Updated access rules for consumers and distributed resources including EV charging (check aneel.gov.br for any subsequent amendments)
ANEEL PRODIST — Procedures for Distribution of Electric Energy Systems in the National Electric System (technical modules governing power quality and connection requirements)

summary.en: In China, grid connection for EV charging stations is governed by State Grid Corporation of China (SGCC) and China Southern Power Grid (CSG) technical standards, as well as NDRC/MIIT policy documents on EV charging infrastructure. There is no direct equivalent to the ANEEL framework in China's centralised grid governance model. Chinese grid connection requirements are based on 50 Hz, 220 V / 380 V systems and do not map directly to Brazilian distribution grid requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，充电站电网接入由国家电网公司（SGCC）和中国南方电网（CSG）技术标准以及国家发展改革委/工业和信息化部关于充电基础设施的政策文件管理。中国集中式电网管理模式下没有与ANEEL框架直接对应的内容。中国电网接入要求基于50Hz、220V/380V系统，与巴西配电网要求没有直接对应关系。
summary.zht: 在中國，充電站電網接入由國家電網公司（SGCC）和中國南方電網（CSG）技術標準以及國家發展改革委/工業和信息化部關於充電基礎設施的政策文件管理。中國集中式電網管理模式下沒有與ANEEL框架直接對應的內容。中國電網接入要求基於50Hz、220V/380V系統，與巴西配電網要求沒有直接對應關係。

standards_or_laws: SGCC Q/GDW 11339-2014 — Technical specification for EV charging station access to distribution network (State Grid; 50 Hz basis; no direct Brazilian equivalent)
NDRC/MIIT guidance documents on EV charging infrastructure development (policy-level; no direct Brazilian equivalent)

gap.en: There is no regulatory equivalence between China's grid connection framework and ANEEL's requirements. Exporters and project developers deploying EV chargers in Brazil must: (1) comply with ANEEL's grid connection procedures for the applicable concessionaire; (2) ensure power quality (harmonics, power factor) meets ANEEL PRODIST technical requirements; (3) for larger installations (typically above 75 kW), obtain a formal grid connection study approval. Chinese equipment documentation will not include ANEEL compliance declarations — these must be added by the Brazilian project developer or system integrator.
gap.zh: 中国电网接入框架与ANEEL要求之间不存在监管等同性。在巴西部署充电设备的出口商和项目开发商须：（1）遵守适用特许权持有人的ANEEL电网接入程序；（2）确保电能质量（谐波、功率因数）符合ANEEL PRODIST技术要求；（3）对于较大型装置（通常超过75kW），须取得正式电网接入研究批准。中国设备文件不会包含ANEEL合规声明——须由巴西项目开发商或系统集成商补充提供。
gap.zht: 中國電網接入框架與ANEEL要求之間不存在監管等同性。在巴西部署充電設備的出口商和項目開發商須：（1）遵守適用特許權持有人的ANEEL電網接入程序；（2）確保電能質量（諧波、功率因數）符合ANEEL PRODIST技術要求；（3）對於較大型裝置（通常超過75kW），須取得正式電網接入研究批准。中國設備文件不會包含ANEEL合規聲明——須由巴西項目開發商或系統集成商補充提供。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — ANEEL grid connection requirements must be met as condition of distribution concessionaire approval; non-compliant installations cannot be legally energised
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable — SGCC/CSG framework governs in China; no ANEEL equivalent

source.publisher: ANEEL — Agência Nacional de Energia Elétrica (Brazil)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] ANEEL regulates grid connection for EV charging stations in Brazil. There is no regulatory equivalence with China's grid connection framework. Compliance is the responsibility of the Brazilian project developer or system integrator, not solely the equipment exporter. However, the exported charger's technical specifications (harmonics, power factor, voltage range, frequency) must be compatible with ANEEL's technical requirements to enable grid connection approval.
compliance_verdict.zh: 【仅供参考】ANEEL负责监管巴西充电站的电网接入。与中国电网接入框架之间不存在监管等同性。合规责任由巴西项目开发商或系统集成商承担，而不仅限于设备出口商。但出口充电设备的技术参数（谐波、功率因数、电压范围、频率）须与ANEEL技术要求兼容，以便获得电网接入批准。
compliance_verdict.zht: 【僅供參考】ANEEL負責監管巴西充電站的電網接入。與中國電網接入框架之間不存在監管等同性。合規責任由巴西項目開發商或系統集成商承擔，而不僅限於設備出口商。但出口充電設備的技術參數（諧波、功率因數、電壓範圍、頻率）須與ANEEL技術要求相容，以便獲得電網接入批准。
